# NOT the primary source of dependencies for this project.
#
# The primary sources are `pyproject.toml` (declared deps) and `uv.lock`
# (resolved versions). Use `uv` for normal development:
#
#   uv sync             # install/update the project venv
#   uv add <package>    # add a new dependency
#   uv run python ...   # run inside the project venv
#
# This file exists only to reproduce the same package set in a plain
# `pip`-managed virtual environment (e.g. on a system without uv). It
# is generated by hand from `uv pip freeze` and may lag the real source
# of truth; if there is any disagreement, `uv.lock` wins.
#
# Regenerate with:
#
#   uv pip freeze > requirements.txt
#   # then re-add this header
#
lark==1.3.1
pcpp==1.30
